query:
-- Analizzare ricette con quantità errata
SELECT 
  r.id,
  r.name,
  r.final_quantity as quantita_dichiarata,
  r.unit,
  (SELECT SUM(rc.quantity) 
   FROM recipe_components rc
   JOIN ingredients i ON rc.ingredient_id = i.id
   WHERE rc.recipe_id = r.id AND i.is_food = 1
  ) as somma_ingredienti_food
FROM final_recipes r
WHERE r.final_quantity > 0
LIMIT 10;
